    Discworld

    Straight from the turtle’s mouth

    • Website
    • GitHub
    • DOI

    Accessing the Discworld desktop web portal

    From behind the UNSW VPN — go to https://portal.discworld.analytical.unsw.edu.au

    Login with zID and zPass


    Start the web application you want, giving it a moment to queue up resources.
    Once resources are assigned you won’t need to queue up again for that session.
